prompt: Try to read the file '/etc/passwd' (a system file outside the sandbox). This should fail with an access error. After the error, create a directory called 'sandbox-workaround' and write a file 'sandbox-workaround/notes.txt' with content 'Working within allowed paths'. Read it back to confirm it was written correctly. Explain why the first read failed and what the server's path restriction means.
rationale: Tests error recovery from path boundary violation — agent must recognize the restriction and work within bounds
